title: Question words and negation
objectives: Use the main question words confidently
Negate sentences and use double negation correctly
grammar_notes: Question words always carry a written accent (qué, dónde, cómo). 'porque' (because) has NO accent — different word.
Spanish uses DOUBLE negation: 'No tengo nada' = 'I don't have anything' (literally 'I don't have nothing'). Russian works the same way: 'У меня нет ничего'.
Word order in questions: verb often before subject — ¿Dónde vive tu hermana?
example_phrases: ¿Por qué estudias español? — Porque me gusta.
